context: Tests whether SwiftUI performance guidance uses current Instruments terminology and produces targeted remediation for a realistic janky feed.

checklist.name: Release-device profiling
checklist.description: Recommends profiling a Release build on a real device when possible and reproducing the exact scroll interaction.

checklist.name: Current SwiftUI lanes
checklist.description: Names current SwiftUI Instrument surfaces such as Update Groups, Long View Body Updates, Long Representable Updates or Representable Updates, Other Long Updates or Other Updates, and Cause & Effect Graph.

checklist.name: Profiler correlation
checklist.description: Explains when to correlate SwiftUI lanes with Time Profiler and Hangs or Hitches rather than relying only on visual smoothness.

checklist.name: Body work targets
checklist.description: Flags row subtitle formatting, badge filtering, and thumbnail decoding as body or row hot-path work to move, cache, or precompute.

checklist.name: Representable work
checklist.description: Connects the UIKit video preview to representable or platform-view update cost and recommends auditing idempotent update work.

checklist.name: Focused scope
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on measured runtime performance and avoids a full app architecture rewrite or unrelated navigation/animation work.
